name: PPTV
evidence: PPTV = Planned Parenthood Texas Votes, Austin-based statewide reproductive-rights advocacy/electoral org; 'ED' = Executive Director. Occupation corroborates.

name: Andrew Delaney Foundation
evidence: Austin, TX private grantmaking foundation (EIN 76-0265537) funding higher ed, health, community service, arts, animal welfare; 'Administrator' fits.

name: LogDNA
evidence: LogDNA (now Mezmo) is a log-management/observability SaaS company; a 'Manager' role fits a software firm.

name: TCJE
evidence: TCJE = Texas Center for Justice and Equity (formerly Texas Criminal Justice Coalition), Austin nonprofit for criminal-justice reform; 'Policy Director' corroborates.

name: Alleaus Health Analytics
evidence: Alleus Health Analytics is a healthcare analytics firm doing mass-tort third-party-liability recovery for providers/health plans; 'Head of Liens' fits liability recovery.

name: Vizient
evidence: Vizient is a large healthcare performance-improvement / group-purchasing company serving hospitals; donor occupation 'RN' corroborates healthcare.

name: Govt
evidence: Self-reported employer 'Govt' with occupation 'Admin' indicates a public-sector employee; specific agency unknown.

name: Chalk Ink
evidence: Chalk Ink is a woman-owned Austin manufacturer/retailer of liquid chalk markers and chalkboard products (5008 Burleson Rd); 'Marketing' fits a consumer-products brand.

name: DMASS
evidence: Ambiguous acronym; dMASS Inc. is an Austin sustainability/AI venture but 'Marketing Manager' does not confirm this is the same DMASS. Cannot classify confidently.

name: Greyhound Lines Inc.
evidence: Greyhound Lines is the national intercity bus carrier; a 'Real Estate' role within it is corporate real estate for a transportation company.

name: Purveyor Design/Self
evidence: Employer string 'Purveyor Design/Self' plus occupation 'Interior Designer' indicates a self-employed interior/design practitioner.

name: TX A&M Agrilife Extension
evidence: Texas A&M AgriLife Extension Service is the educational outreach agency of the Texas A&M University System; 'Admin Assistant II' is a staff role.

name: Primerica
evidence: Primerica is a financial-services company selling term life insurance and investments; 'Financial Services' occupation corroborates.

name: Spock Care Management LLC
evidence: Spock Care Management LLC is an Austin aging-life-care management company (owner Heidi Shanklin-Spock); occupation 'Aging Life Care Manager' matches.

name: Texas A&M Agrilife Extension-EFNEP
evidence: Texas A&M AgriLife Extension EFNEP (Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program) is a university nutrition-education program; 'Administrative Assistant' is a staff role.

name: BWM
evidence: Ambiguous 3-letter acronym with only occupation 'Sales'; no reliable match to a specific Austin employer. Not classifiable.

name: Bernie Sanders
evidence: Employer is the Bernie Sanders political campaign/organization; occupation 'National Barnstorm Director & Texas State Director' is progressive campaign staff work (no clean taxonomy label for campaigns).

name: Ferrovial
evidence: Ferrovial is a Spanish multinational infrastructure/construction group (toll roads, airports; US HQ) formerly parent of Cintra; 'VP HR' is a corporate role.

name: Vaco Google
evidence: Vaco is a staffing/consulting firm; 'Vaco Google' indicates a Vaco contractor placed at Google (a technology company); occupation 'Detection Agent' is a tech/trust-and-safety role.

name: New Waterloo
evidence: New Waterloo is an Austin hospitality group operating restaurants and hotels; occupation 'Server' corroborates.

name: Workrise
evidence: Workrise (formerly RigUp) is an Austin workforce-management tech marketplace for skilled labor (originally energy sector); 'Senior Product Manager' fits a software company.

name: Council On At Risk Youth
evidence: Council on At-Risk Youth (CARY) is an Austin nonprofit providing counseling/mentoring to at-risk students; 'Executive Director' corroborates.

name: Inspire Family Health
evidence: Inspire Family Health is a primary-care clinic in central Austin (711 W 38th St); occupation 'Nurse Practitioner' matches staff.

name: Wendy's
evidence: Wendy's is a fast-food restaurant chain (food service); occupation 'Fry Cook' corroborates.

name: Commio
evidence: Commio (thinQ) is an Austin-based cloud voice/CPaaS telecom-API technology company; 'CSO' is an executive role there.

name: PPM
evidence: Ambiguous 3-letter acronym with only occupation 'Manager'; too many possible referents (property management, project management, etc.). Not classifiable.

name: TownePark
evidence: Towne Park is a national valet-parking and hospitality-staffing services provider for hotels/healthcare; occupation 'Valet' matches.

name: Sahara Lounge
evidence: Sahara Lounge is a well-known East Austin live-music venue and bar; occupation 'Business owner' corroborates.

name: McCartan Law
evidence: McCartan Law is a law firm; occupation 'Attorney' corroborates.

name: Four Seasons Travel and Tours
evidence: Four Seasons Travel is an Austin luxury travel agency/advisor (Bee Caves Rd); occupation 'Travel Tours' corroborates. (Unrelated to Four Seasons Hotels.)

name: Unisys
evidence: Unisys is a global IT services and technology company; occupation 'Tech Writer' fits.

name: MSDF
evidence: MSDF = Michael & Susan Dell Foundation, Austin-headquartered private foundation; occupation 'Accountant' is a foundation finance role.

name: The Jewelry Channel dba Liquidation Channel
evidence: The Jewelry Channel / Liquidation Channel (now Shop LC, subsidiary of Vaibhav Global) is an Austin-based cable home-shopping retailer selling jewelry and lifestyle goods; 'Television Producer' is a production role at the shopping channel.

name: Tcdd
evidence: TCDD = Texas Council for Developmental Disabilities, a Texas state government agency in Austin; occupation 'Policy analyst' matches a public-policy staff role.
